title: Bowire sidecar plugin manifest
description: The sidecar.json manifest that marks a directory under ~/.bowire/plugins/ as a Bowire sidecar (non-.NET) protocol plugin. See docs/architecture/sidecar-plugins.md.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor tooling.

packageId.description: Reverse-DNS package id (e.g. Acme.Bowire.Protocol.Zenoh); surfaced in `bowire plugin list`.

protocol.description: Protocol metadata declared upfront, before `initialize` can override name/iconSvg.

id.description: Protocol id the workbench tabs against; must equal what the sidecar returns from `initialize`.

iconSvg.description: Inline SVG icon; the `initialize` reply may override it.

transport.description: Wire transport: stdio (spawn `executable`, JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout) or http (POST JSON-RPC to `url`, notifications over SSE).

executable.description: Path to the sidecar executable, relative to the plugin directory. Required for the stdio transport.

args.description: Extra args appended to the executable command line (stdio).

envPrefix.description: Env-var prefix forwarded to the subprocess (stdio).

url.description: JSON-RPC endpoint for the http transport (e.g. http://localhost:7000/bowire). Required when transport is http.

version.description: Optional version string for `bowire plugin list` (sidecars carry no NuGet version).
